---
name: Spec feedback
about: Report ambiguity, inconsistency, or interoperability risk in the MRPAF specification
title: "[spec] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Section

Which section, schema fragment, or example are you reviewing?

## Current Text

Quote the exact sentence, rule, schema fragment, or example snippet.

## Problem

Describe why the current wording or structure is ambiguous, inconsistent, risky, or difficult to implement.

## Impact

Explain what could go wrong in a reader, writer, viewer, editor, or AI generator implementation.

## Proposed Fix

Provide replacement text or a concrete change when possible.

## Notes

Add any implementation context, validation output, or compatibility concern that may help evaluate the issue.
